## Summary

- What changed?
- Why was this change needed?

## Verification

- [ ] `pnpm check`
- [ ] `pnpm test`
- [ ] `pnpm build`
- [ ] `pnpm e2e` (if UI/runtime paths changed)

## Risk Review

- [ ] No secrets added
- [ ] No destructive migrations or hidden breaking changes
- [ ] Documentation updated (if behavior changed)
